enviroment.paragraph: Guided by our sensitivity and responsibility toward our environment, society and future, we use a nature-friendly production model and work for a sustainable world and a better future.

hero.subtitle: Managing all processes from prototyping to mass production under one roof, Ceyhunlar Plastik provides reliable solutions for your industrial needs in plastic, rubber and bakelite products with high quality, engineering strength and a wide product range.

about.subtitle: From Project to Mass Production
about.lead: As Ceyhunlar Plastik Sanayi ve Ticaret Ltd. Şti., we are with you at every step of your project.
about.body1: For your plastic, rubber, metal and bakelite product projects, we produce custom solutions with our benefit/cost-focused business model that starts from a draft, develops with R&D and results in mass production.
about.body2: To bring your projects to the final product, we offer 3D modeling, model analysis, sample and prototype production, production analysis, molding and mass production printing services under one roof.
about.body3: You can benefit from our R&D services for your new product development requests, get a price quote for your custom product orders, review our catalogs displaying more than 35,000 products, and contact us to become our dealer.
about.infoDescription: The knowledge and competence of our team guarantee the quality and reliability of the solutions we offer.

cards.title: R&D and Prototyping

cards.title: CNC Machining

cards.title: Mass Production Metal
cards.description: Parts whose metal mass-production molds are complete are taken into the high-precision metal mass production process in our press shop.

cards.title: Mass Production Plastic
cards.description: Plastic parts whose mass-production molds are complete are taken into mass production by injection, blow molding and extrusion methods.

cards.title: Mass Production Rubber
cards.description: Mass production of rubber parts whose mass-production molds are complete is carried out in our hydraulic press section.

cards.title: Mass Production Bakelite
cards.description: Mass production of bakelite parts whose mass-production molds are complete is carried out in our bakelite injection section.

meta.title: Sustainability
meta.description: Ceyhunlar Plastik's sustainable production and environmentally friendly approach.

intro.heroBody: Sustainable production is a way of manufacturing that is based on using the world's resources within sustainability limits, seeks ways to minimize the harm done to natural life, and secures the future. Today, all producers, like all consumers, must take sustainable steps. As Ceyhunlar Plastik, we do our part and take clean steps for a clean world.
intro.protectTitle: We Protect Our Natural Resources <highlight>and Our World.</highlight>
intro.protectBody: With the mission of acting with the environmental awareness we have adopted, we aim to bring years of knowledge and experience to the global plastics industry, developing dynamic and innovative solutions that consider both our country and nature.

impact.title: Recyclable Plastic
impact.body1: Plastic is a component of many consumer products and makes up most of the output and end products of the manufacturing industry. However, not all plastics are the same, which means they cannot all be disposed of and recycled in the same way.
impact.body2: As Ceyhunlar Plastik, we produce recyclable products. Within the framework of respect for nature, we take care to use renewable energy sources in our production area.

energy.title: Our Energy <highlight>Comes from the Sun!</highlight>
energy.body: Our company takes an important step toward the energy needs of the future with sustainable energy solutions. Solar energy is a clean, renewable and unlimited resource that nature offers us. We meet our energy needs by using this valuable resource.

meta.title: Catalogs
meta.description: Browse Ceyhunlar Plastik product catalogs and download them as PDF.

meta.title: Mass Production
meta.description: Ceyhunlar Plastik mass production: sheet metal, plastic injection, rubber and bakelite.

metal.intro: “Sheet metal” is a term that generally refers to metal sheets or plates. In the metal industry, it refers to metal sheets usually made of materials such as steel, aluminum or copper. These metal sheets can be of various thicknesses and properties and are used in industrial applications, the construction sector, the automotive industry, shipbuilding and many other fields.

items.title: Materials:
items.text: Sheet metal is usually made of metal materials such as steel, aluminum, copper and stainless steel. Material selection can vary depending on a range of criteria such as application, durability and cost factors.

items.title: Production Process:
items.text: Sheet metal is produced by bringing metal plates to the desired thickness and shape using various production processes such as rolling or pressing. Metal sheets are shaped by rolling machines or pressing equipment.

items.title: Areas of Use:
items.text: Sheet metal has a wide range of uses across many industries and sectors. For example, it is used in roof coverings in construction, vehicle body parts in the automotive industry, coating panels in appliance manufacturing and many other areas.

items.title: Various Thicknesses and Sizes:
items.text: Sheet metal is available in a wide variety of thicknesses and sizes. This means it can be selected to suit specific application requirements.

items.title: Corrosion Resistance and Coating:
items.text: Some types, such as stainless steel sheet metal, have corrosion-resistant properties to increase their durability. In addition, in some cases they can be subjected to special coating processes.

items.title: Sustainability:
items.text: Recycling metal can increase the sustainability of sheet metal. Using recyclable metal can reduce environmental impact and use natural resources more efficiently.

metal.summaryQuote: “Sheet metal is a material widely preferred in many industries due to its advantages such as durability, strength and formability. The use of this material continuously evolves along with technological developments.”
metal.summaryBody: Mold design refers to the design process of the mold or matrix used for mass production of products from materials such as metal or plastic. This design process is carried out to ensure that a predetermined product is produced in a specific form, size and material.
designItems: Needs Analysis: The first step is to analyze the needs and requirements of the part to be produced. This includes the part's dimensions, material, durability and other properties.
Design Concepts: Based on the needs analysis, different design concepts are developed. These concepts include factors such as the shape, dimensions, material and production process of the product.
CAD (Computer-Aided Design) Modeling: The selected design concepts are modeled digitally using CAD software. This step involves creating a three-dimensional design of the product.

Analysis and Optimization: Analyses are performed on the CAD model and factors such as the design's durability, fluidity and temperature distribution are examined. If necessary, design optimization is carried out.
moldItems: Detailed Design: A detailed study is carried out on the selected design. In this step, every detail of the part, tolerances, assembly points and material selection are determined.

Determining the Production Process: Mold design includes determining the production process. This covers factors such as which material will be used, the mold production process and the equipment needed for mold production.
Prototype Production and Testing: A prototype of the design is produced and tested. This is important to evaluate how the design performs under real-world conditions.

Mold Production: After prototype tests, mold production is carried out according to the approved design. This is usually done using high-precision production methods such as CNC (Computer Numerical Control) machines or electrical discharge processes.
metal.closing: Mold design plays a critical role in industrial production processes and has a major impact on the quality, cost and production speed of products. A good mold design allows products to be produced and marketed more effectively.

paragraphs: Plastic injection is one of the most widely used methods in mass production. This process, carried out by injecting molten plastic into a mold under high pressure, provides fast, repeatable and cost-efficient production.
Parts produced with high precision are used in many sectors such as automotive, appliances, electronics, medical and packaging.
Thanks to the variety in mold design, very complex forms can be produced and thousands of parts can be obtained in series at the same time.
Thanks to its advantages of durability, flexibility and low cost, plastic injection is an indispensable manufacturing method in the industry.

In the mass production process, hydraulic presses are used especially for the production of rubber products. Rubber is an elastic and durable material and is widely used in a range of industries, especially in sectors such as automotive, electronics, medicine and construction.

Hydraulic presses provide an effective and efficient method for the mass production of rubber products. This process is widely used in the production of rubber seals, seal profiles, rubber parts and similar products.

Bakelite is a hard thermoset plastic resistant to heat and chemicals. Due to its electrical insulation property, it is widely used in the electrical and electronics industry. It is also preferred in kitchenware, telephone bodies and various industrial equipment.

Bakelite, which can be easily transformed into the desired form by molding, maintains its mechanical strength even at high temperatures. Thanks to these properties, it holds an important place in the industry as a long-lasting, reliable and cost-efficient material.
Today, despite the emergence of modern plastics, bakelite continues to be preferred in some special applications.

meta.title: CNC Machining
meta.description: Ceyhunlar Plastik machining services: turning, milling, drilling and grinding.

machining.introBody: Machining is a production method used to process metal and other materials. It is generally used to shape and process metal parts and produces metal chips. Machining includes various sub-processes and typically covers operations such as turning, milling, drilling and grinding.

items.title: Turning:
items.text: In turning, a material is rotated on a lathe on a rotating spindle, allowing a cutting tool to shape the material. This method is generally used to produce cylindrical parts.

items.title: Milling:
items.text: Milling involves a rotating cutting tool moving over a workpiece fixed on a bed to create the desired shape. This method is widely used to produce flat surfaces, grooves and complex shapes.

items.title: Drilling:
items.text: Drilling is used to open holes in a material. In drilling, holes are opened in the material, usually using a rotating drill bit.

items.title: Grinding:
items.text: Grinding is used to smooth, polish or shape the surface of a material within a certain tolerance. Grinding plays an important role in producing precision parts and improving surface quality.

meta.title: 3D Printing and Scanning
meta.description: Ceyhunlar Plastik 3D printing and scanning services; rapid prototyping and additive manufacturing.

printing3d.introBody: 3D printing is a manufacturing technology in which three-dimensional objects are built layer by layer. This technology is used to turn digital models created with computer-aided design (CAD) software into physical objects. 3D printing is also known as “additive manufacturing” or “rapid prototyping”.

items.title: How It Works:
items.text: 3D printing brings material together in layers to create an object. These layers are formed using information taken from a digital design file.

items.title: Materials:
items.text: The materials used in 3D printing cover a wide range. Different materials such as plastic, metal, ceramic, resin and even biological materials can be used. Material selection depends on the intended use of the object and the design requirements.

items.title: Application Areas:
items.text: 3D printing is used in prototype development, manufacturing, medicine, education, construction, fashion and a range of other industrial sectors. It is especially popular for the rapid production of custom and complex parts, prototyping, and the production of personalized products.

items.title: Rapid Prototyping:
items.text: 3D printing allows designs to be quickly turned into physical prototypes. This can speed up the product development process and reduce costs.

items.title: Sustainability:
items.text: 3D printing has the potential to minimize material waste. Unlike traditional production methods, it allows only the necessary material to be used.

printing3d.closing: R&D and prototype development processes are important tools for ensuring an organization's sustainability, gaining a competitive advantage and responding better to customer needs. Well-planned R&D and effective prototype development processes can contribute to a company's growth and success.

meta.title: R&D and Prototyping
meta.description: Ceyhunlar Plastik R&D and prototyping processes: innovation, product development and rapid prototyping.

arge.block1Body: R&D (Research and Development) and prototype development play a critical role in the innovation and progress of an organization or company. These processes are used to create, improve and test new products, services or business processes.
block2Items: Innovation and Progress: R&D means discovering and developing new ideas and technologies. This is critical for the company to maintain its competitive advantage.

Product and Process Development: R&D activities can be carried out to improve existing products or business processes and make them more efficient. This can increase product quality and optimize production processes.
Market Analysis: R&D can be used to understand market trends and customer needs. This can help develop products and services that meet future demand.

Technological Competition: R&D activities can be used to gain a technological competitive advantage. Innovative technologies and solutions can help the company maintain its leadership in the industry.
block3Items: Physical Product or Process Modeling: Prototype development involves creating a physical model of an idea or concept. This is important for identifying design flaws and making improvements.
Testing and Feedback: Prototypes can be tested under real-world conditions. This is used to evaluate the performance of the product or process and to collect customer feedback.

Cost and Time Savings: The prototype development stage can help prevent costly mistakes in the final product or process and save time. Early detection of errors that are difficult to fix in later stages is possible.
Encouraging Innovation: Prototypes encourage a culture of innovation within the company. They allow creative ideas to be expressed concretely and let team members see their contributions.
arge.closing: R&D and prototype development processes are important tools for ensuring an organization's sustainability, gaining a competitive advantage and responding better to customer needs. Well-planned R&D and effective prototype development processes can contribute to a company's growth and success.

meta.title: About Us
meta.description: Detailed information about Ceyhunlar Plastik. Manufacturing, quality and trust since 2001.

hero.title:
In Custom Manufacturing

Your Trusted Business Partner
hero.description: Since 2001, we have been meeting our customers’ needs at the highest quality standards with our strong production infrastructure and innovative approach.

content.title: About Us
content.intro: As Ceyhunlar Plastik Sanayii, we laid our foundations in İzmir and have grown into a strong manufacturer serving customers worldwide.
content.reach: With more than 850 dealers and over 12,000 customers, we operate in more than 40 countries, primarily Türkiye. Our products are used in furniture, automotive, medical, defense, construction and many other industries.
content.capabilities: Thanks to our advanced production technologies and continuously expanding product range, we deliver fast, high-quality and reliable solutions for our customers’ needs.
content.rnd: With our R&D investments, environmentally conscious production approach and high quality standards, we continue to make a difference in the industry.
content.mission: Our goal is to deliver sustainable and innovative solutions while keeping customer satisfaction at the highest level.

details.devIntro: Since the day we started serving our customers, we have closely followed evolving technology and industry trends to keep improving — and we continue to do so.
details.devInitiatives: In line with this, we have also taken initiatives to meet the needs of today’s commerce.
details.devRnd3d: To meet customer needs in the most accurate way, we increased our R&D investments. In this process we also benefited from 3D technology, and in 2018 we launched our R&D and 3D unit.
details.devEndToEnd: As a company that handles 3D printing, planning, molding, mass production, assembly, packaging and shipping entirely in-house, we have succeeded in meeting our customers’ needs.
details.devClosing: At Ceyhunlar Plastik, we bring your ideas to life.
details.mottoTitle: Your <highlight>Leading</highlight> Solution Partner for Plastic Needs!
details.mottoQuote: “With High Standards of Quality and Trust…”
details.mottoBody1: The heart and soul of a company is creativity and innovation. But without determination and passion for the work, success is not possible.
details.mottoBody2: At Ceyhunlar Plastik, we have been crowning our passion for our work with determination since day one.
